standards.description: Guidelines for AI collaboration to prevent hallucination and ensure evidence-based responses

standards.description: DEPRECATED: Migrated to DevAP per DEC-049. Agent envelope/handoff protocol — see dev-autopilot/standards/orchestration/agent-communication-protocol.ai.yaml

standards.name: AI Model Selection Strategy
standards.nameZh: AI 模型分級選擇策略
standards.description: Three-tier model selection strategy (fast/standard/capable) with cost-effective escalation

standards.name: Git Worktree Isolation
standards.description: Git worktree lifecycle management: setup → baseline → execute → merge → cleanup

standards.name: Branch Completion Workflow
standards.description: DEPRECATED: Migrated to DevAP per DEC-049. Branch completion workflow — see dev-autopilot/standards/flow/branch-completion.ai.yaml

standards.name: Verification Evidence Standard
standards.description: Iron Law: no verification evidence = no completion claim. RED-GREEN cycle for bug fixes

standards.name: Architecture Decision Records
standards.description: Lightweight, version-controlled records of significant architectural decisions with context, options, and rationale

standards.name: Retrospective Standards
standards.description: Structured team retrospectives for Sprint and Release cycles with facilitation techniques and action item tracking

standards.name: Observability Standards
standards.description: Three pillars observability framework (Logs, Metrics, Traces) with Golden Signals and maturity model

standards.name: SLO Standards
standards.description: SLI/SLO/Error Budget definitions, setting methodology, and service templates

standards.name: Alerting Standards
standards.description: Alert severity classification, escalation, noise reduction, and SLO-based alerting

standards.name: Runbook Standards
standards.description: Runbook writing, maintenance, drills, and alert integration

standards.name: Postmortem Standards
standards.description: Blameless postmortem process, root cause analysis, action items tracking, and organizational learning

standards.name: Tech Debt Management Standards
standards.description: Tech debt taxonomy, registry, budget, impact matrix, and metrics

standards.name: Feature Flag Standards
standards.description: Feature flag types, lifecycle, TTL, audit, and decay detection

standards.name: Environment Standards
standards.description: Environment tiers, configuration management, parity, and secret management

standards.name: Containerization Standards
standards.description: Container image build best practices, tagging, security scanning, and registry management

standards.name: Deprecation & Sunset Standards
standards.description: API deprecation, feature sunset, system decommission lifecycle

standards.name: Knowledge Transfer Standards
standards.description: Onboarding, handoff, bus factor assessment, and code tour

standards.name: Test Data Management Standards
standards.description: Test data strategies, anonymization, fixtures, isolation, and anti-patterns

standards.name: Chaos Engineering Standards
standards.description: Chaos experiment design, fault injection, safety guardrails, and SLO integration

standards.name: Supply Chain Security Standards
standards.description: SBOM formats, dependency audit, SLSA levels, license compliance

standards.name: Estimation Standards
standards.description: Estimation methods, calibration, anti-patterns, confidence levels

standards.name: Design Document Standards
standards.description: HLD/LLD templates, C4 architecture diagrams, design review checklist

standards.name: Privacy Standards
standards.description: Privacy by Design, data classification, DPIA, user rights

standards.name: Frontend Design Standards
standards.description: DESIGN.md 9-section spec format, semantic color tokens, font roles, spacing scale, UI hard constraints, anti-patterns

standards.name: Dual-Phase LLM Output Standard
standards.nameZh: 雙階段 LLM 輸出標準
standards.description: Dual-phase LLM output pattern: <analysis> thinking discarded, <summary> structured conclusion retained. Saves 1000-3500 tokens per review invocation.

standards.name: Circuit Breaker Standard
standards.description: 3-state circuit breaker (CLOSED/HALF_OPEN/OPEN) to prevent API stampede from consecutive failures. Default failureThreshold: 3.

standards.name: Token Budget Zone Standard
standards.description: 4-zone token budget model (safe/warning/danger/blocking) for graceful degradation before hitting hard token limits.

standards.name: Security Decision Standard
standards.description: deny>ask>allow arbitration rule with projectSettings trust radius protection. deny always wins regardless of source priority.

standards.name: Capability Declaration Standard
standards.description: Fail-Closed capability defaults for all tools and adapters: isConcurrencySafe, isReadOnly, requiresUserConfirmation all default to safe values.

standards.name: Immutability-First Architecture Standard
standards.description: System-level immutability: DTO fields as readonly, ReadonlyArray<T> for arrays, spread syntax for mutations, deep immutability across parallel boundaries.

standards.name: Failure Source Taxonomy Standard
standards.description: 8-class failureSource dimension (why) on top of TaskStatus (what), enabling Recovery Recipe Registry to precisely match strategies per failure type.

standards.name: Recovery Recipe Registry Standard
standards.description: Unified YAML-configurable Recovery Recipe format keyed by failureSource (XSPEC-045), with 6 built-in strategies and 5 default recipes, backward-compatible fallback.

standards.name: Retry Standards
standards.description: Exponential backoff with full jitter, max_attempts cap, and failure-source-aware retry rules (DEC-043 Wave 1 Reliability, XSPEC-067, trial).

standards.name: Timeout Standards
standards.description: Cascading 0.8x per-layer timeout budget, deadline propagation via absolute timestamps, circuit-breaker integration (DEC-043 Wave 1 Reliability, XSPEC-067, trial).

standards.name: Health Check Standards
standards.description: Liveness/readiness/startup probe separation, deep health check scope (critical deps only), structured JSON response (DEC-043 Wave 1 Reliability, XSPEC-067, trial).

standards.name: Standard Admission Criteria
standards.description: Four admission gates (Evidence / Scope / Non-overlapping / AI-executable) for new UDS standards, with explicit rejection protocol (DEC-043 Wave 1 Governance Meta, XSPEC-070, trial).

standards.name: Standard Lifecycle Management
standards.description: 5-state lifecycle machine (Proposed/Trial/Active/Deprecated/Archived) with legal transitions and required frontmatter fields (DEC-043 Wave 1 Governance Meta, XSPEC-070, trial).

standards.name: Skill-Standard Alignment Check
standards.nameZh: Skill 與 Standard 對齊檢查
standards.description: Skills must anchor to a Standard; Standards may exist without a Skill. Orphan-skill detection workflow (DEC-043 Wave 1 Governance Meta, XSPEC-070, trial).

standards.name: Translation Lifecycle Standards
standards.description: MISSING vs OUTDATED distinction, semver-aware severity (PATCH/MINOR/MAJOR), and automation integration (pre-commit hook, release gate) for multi-locale documentation

standards.name: Git Push Safety Gates
standards.nameZh: Git Push 安全閘門標準
standards.description: Git push safety gates, protected branch detection, force-push guardrails, pre-push quality gate enforcement, and push receipt audit trail

standards.name: No-CI/CD Deployment Strategy
standards.description: Reliable deployment strategy without CI/CD platforms: shell scripts with fail-fast, smoke test verification, Blue-Green rollback

standards.name: Rollback Standards
standards.description: Rollback trigger conditions, auto vs manual decisions, and error budget integration

standards.name: CD Deployment Strategies
standards.description: Strategy selection matrix for blue-green, canary, rolling, and recreate deployments

standards.name: Pipeline Security Gates
standards.description: Security checkpoints embedded in CI pipeline — SAST, DAST, SCA, secrets scan with block/warn/log behavior

standards.name: SLO/SLI Definition Standards
standards.description: SLI selection per service type, SLO target-setting methodology, error budget policies, and multi-window burn-rate alerting

standards.name: Runbook Writing Standards
standards.description: Required sections, reproducible steps, naming conventions, review cadence, and drill frequency for operational runbooks

standards.name: Incident Response Standards
standards.description: Severity classification, IC role, stakeholder communication, blameless postmortem, on-call rotation, and incident metrics

standards.name: License Compliance Standards
standards.description: License tier classification, automated scanning in CI, SBOM generation, attribution notices, and violation remediation

standards.name: PII Classification and Handling Standards
standards.description: Three-tier PII sensitivity classification, data minimization, masking in non-production, retention schedules, and cross-border transfer controls

standards.name: Audit Trail Standards
standards.description: Mandatory auditable events, record schema, immutability, retention periods, query/export, and SIEM integration

standards.name: Schema Evolution Standards
standards.description: Backward-compatible change patterns, prohibited breaking changes, expand-contract migration, schema versioning, and CI compatibility checks

standards.name: Data Contract Standards
standards.description: Data contract specification format, quality SLOs, breaking-change governance, automated contract testing, and consumer registration

standards.name: Data Pipeline Standards
standards.description: Idempotency, error handling with DLQs, checkpointing, data lineage, pipeline observability SLOs, and testing requirements

standards.name: Infrastructure as Code Design Principles
standards.nameZh: 基礎設施即程式碼設計原則
standards.description: Four IaC principles (reproducible, immutable, idempotent, versioned), remote state with locking, and drift detection with three-category classification

standards.name: Container Image Build and Security Standards
standards.nameZh: 容器映像建構與安全標準
standards.description: Dockerfile five principles (multi-stage, non-root, distroless, no secrets, SBOM labels), SBOM embedding via syft/trivy, and CVE scanning block policy

standards.name: Secret Management and Credential Hygiene Standards
standards.nameZh: 機密管理與憑證衛生標準
standards.description: Three secret source tiers (Vault, Cloud KMS, SOPS), rotation policies by credential type, hardcoded secret prevention, and safe injection patterns

standards.name: Product Requirements Document Standards
standards.description: PRD five sections (Problem, Persona, Metrics, Scope, Constraints), PRD-to-user-story bridge with metric traceability, and post-kickoff revision policy

standards.name: Product Metrics Framework Standards
standards.description: Framework selection matrix (AARRR/HEART/North Star), North Star four criteria, three-level metric hierarchy, and anti-vanity metric rule

standards.name: User Story Mapping Standards
standards.description: Three-layer story map (Backbone, Walking Skeleton, Detail Stories), MVP horizontal slice rule, INVEST compliance per story, and GWT acceptance criteria

standards.name: Secure-Op Standard
standards.nameZh: AI Agent 安全操作標準
standards.description: AI Agent secure operation methodology: Veto-based decision, SOBR risk scoring, Fail-Closed principle, tamper-evident audit chain, HITL escalation, and prompt injection defense

standards.name: Server Operations Security
standards.description: SSH hardening, host configuration, privilege management, bastion patterns, patch management SLA, and network isolation for AI Agent production environments

standards.name: Container Security
standards.description: Container image hardening, registry security, runtime protection, secrets management, Kubernetes network policy, and supply chain integrity for AI Agent production environments

standards.name: Adversarial Test Standards
standards.description: Red-team corpus design for AI agents: OWASP LLM Top 10 adversarial probes (prompt injection LLM01, PII exfiltration LLM06, privilege escalation LLM08, source-agent spoofing)
